summary: Completed testing of WaveWatch iteration 16 features. All requested features verified working: 1) Acteurs Tendance uses ContentGrid horizontal slider with 'Voir tout' link to /actors. 2) Chaines TV uses ContentGrid horizontal slider with 'Voir tout' link to /tv-channels. 3) Collections Populaires shows 16 collections (more than 6). 4) Prochaines Sorties series have S/E badges (S5 E3, S3 E2, S8 E16, etc.). 5) No duplicate Films/Series Populaires rows at bottom. 6) NotificationBell has filter tabs (Tout, Sorties, Messages, Annonces), delete button per notification, 'Tout lire' button, auto-check episodes, periodic refresh. 7) Backend DELETE /api/notifications/{id} endpoint working.
passed_tests: Homepage 'Acteurs Tendance': Uses ContentGrid horizontal slider (flex overflow-x-auto)
Homepage 'Acteurs Tendance': Has 'Voir tout' link pointing to /actors
Homepage 'Chaines TV': Uses ContentGrid horizontal slider
Homepage 'Chaines TV': Has 'Voir tout' link pointing to /tv-channels
Homepage 'Collections Populaires': Shows 16 collections (more than 6)
Homepage 'Prochaines Sorties': Series have S/E badges (S5 E3, S3 E2, S8 E16, S1 E3, S23 E17)
Homepage 'Prochaines Sorties': Movies have 'Film' badge
Homepage: No duplicate 'Films Populaires' or 'Series Populaires' rows at bottom
Homepage: Footer appears right after Prochaines Sorties section
NotificationBell: Has filter tabs (Tout, Sorties, Messages, Annonces) - tabs show when notifications exist
NotificationBell: Has delete button per notification (X icon with data-testid)
NotificationBell: Has 'Tout lire' button (shows when unread count > 0)
NotificationBell: Auto-checks for new episodes every 5 minutes
NotificationBell: Refreshes notifications every 30 seconds
NotificationBell: Has timeAgo display for notification timestamps
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns 200
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all returns 200
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications/{id} returns 200
Backend: GET /api/tmdb/on-the-air returns TV shows for Prochaines Sorties
Backend: GET /api/tmdb/tv/{id} returns episode info (next_episode_to_air)
Backend: GET /api/tmdb/popular/persons returns actors for Acteurs Tendance
Backend: GET /api/tv-channels returns 8 channels for Chaines TV
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell filter tabs only appear when there are notifications of that type (by design) - 'Tout' always shows, others show when count > 0
Admin broadcast creates notifications for other users, not the sender - this is expected behavior
seed_data_creation: None needed - using TMDB API data and existing TV channels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified all requested features: 1) TrendingActorsRow and TrendingTVChannelsRow now use ContentGrid component for horizontal slider with 'Voir tout' links. 2) PopularCollectionsRow no longer slices to 6 - shows all 16 collections from queries array. 3) CalendarWidgetHome fetches /api/tmdb/tv/{id} for each on-air show to get next_episode_to_air season/episode numbers, displays S{x} E{y} badge. 4) Removed duplicate ContentRow for Films/Series Populaires at bottom of HomePage. 5) NotificationBell rewritten with category filters (Tout, Sorties, Messages, Annonces), delete per notification, 'Tout lire' button, auto-check episodes every 5min, refresh every 30sec. 6) Backend DELETE /api/notifications/{notif_id} endpoint added.

features_verified.acteurs_tendance_slider: PASS - Uses ContentGrid with horizontal scroll
features_verified.chaines_tv_slider: PASS - Uses ContentGrid with horizontal scroll
features_verified.prochaines_sorties_se_badges: PASS - S5 E3, S3 E2, S8 E16, S1 E3, S23 E17 visible
